summary.lv: MONELIQ EUROPE meklē IS Security Officer ar pieredzi drošības pārvaldībā, WAF, ugunsmūros, endpoint security un mākoņtehnoloģijās. Hibrīds darbs, atalgojums €3500–4000 mēnesī.
summary.en: MONELIQ EUROPE is seeking an IS Security Officer with experience in security management, WAF, firewalls, endpoint security, and cloud computing, offering a hybrid role with a salary of €3,500–4,000/month.
